queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the impact of lacking a checking account on increased credit default probability.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: balance below 0 DM.
queries.question: Investigation into the relationship between negative checking account balances and reduced probability of credit default.

queries.feature_definition: Loan purpose: purchase of a new car.
queries.question: Assessing the contribution of loan purposes for new car purchases to elevated credit risk and default likelihood.
